resources.string: Maintained by Alexandru (zanderp). Free software under the GNU AGPL v3 or later — see LICENSE and NOTICE in the repository for the full copyright and attribution text.

You may use, study, share, and modify this app under the AGPL. If you redistribute a modified version (including as a network service), you must offer the complete corresponding source under the same license.

Built on the open-cfmoto community lineage:

• dcoletto / coletz — original QR & EasyConn work
• BojanJ — Android Auto receiver integration
• richardbizik — 1000 MT‑X support
• ionutradu252 / open-cflink — handlebar controls, margins, reconnect & polish
• eugen0309 — Wi‑Fi Direct / CL‑C450 path
• headunit-revived — Android Auto projection stack (AGPL)

And everyone who tested bikes, shared logs, and filed issues.

OpenCfMoto is an independent community project. It is not affiliated with, endorsed by, or sponsored by CFMOTO, Google, or Android Auto. CFMOTO, MotoPlay, EasyConn, Android, and Android Auto are trademarks of their respective owners. Use at your own risk — set your route before you ride.
Works with any CFMoto dash that shows a MotoPlay / EasyConnect pairing QR. No T‑BOX required. US and international both work — if you see the QR, try Connect.
800MT (MT‑X / Explore / Explore GT) · 1000 MT‑X · 800NK (US CRCP) · 800NK Advanced · 450SR (+ SR‑S / TC) · 450CL‑C / CL‑C450 · 150SC scooter
Full list — known EasyConnect / MotoPlay dashes

Naked: 125NK · 450NK · 675NK · 800NK · 800NK Advanced · 800NK Sport · 800NK (US CRCP)
Sport: 300SR · 450SR · 450SR‑S · 450SR TC · 500SR VOOM · 675SR · 675SR‑R
Touring / Adv: 450MT · 700MT · 700MT Adventure · 800MT‑X · 800MT Explore · 800MT Explore GT · 1000 MT‑X
Cruiser: 450CL‑C · CL‑C450
Scooter: 150SC
ATV / SSV (TFT): CFORCE 800 · CFORCE 850 Touring · CFORCE 1000 · CFORCE 1000 Touring
Other: U10 Pro (where the dash offers the QR)
800MT Sport · 800MT Touring · 450SR World Champion Edition · 700CL‑X (Adventure / Heritage / Sport) · PAPIO — unless your unit shows the QR anyway.
Full list online: github.com/zanderp/open-cfmoto → docs/SUPPORTED-BIKES.md — report new bikes in Discord.
